name: Picante Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1/2 medium green pepper, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender.
2. Blend on medium speed until the tomatoes are minced but not pureed.
3. Transfer the mixture to a covered container and refrigerate for up to one month.
Note: For hot picante sauce, add 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder and 1/2 teaspoon onion powder when blending.
